turns.tutor_turn: (generic)You know you can increase a number by 30% by timesing it by 1.3. So 1.3*50=65. Similarly, you can reduce a number by 20% by timesing it by 0.8. So 0.8*65=52. It can be a bit quicker to do it this way. But your answer and approach to the problem are correct.

turns.tutor_turn:
Now try this similar problem on your own without any hints. Show your reasoning step by step:

A certain store sells computer accessories and equipment. Due to a fire outbreak in one of the factories, the price of RAM increased by 39.4%. After two years, the price stabilized and finally fell by 25.1% from what it has risen. What is the current price of RAM if it was $63.9 before the fire?
